servinfo.title: Precautions for Replacing Keyless Start Control Module

item.ptxt: When replacing the keyless start control module, replace it with a new one.
After keyless start control module is replaced with new one, perform “Immobilizer Key Registration” using SUZUKI scan tool.
When keyless start control module and ECM are replaced at the same time, refer to ECM Registration for their registration.
All of remote controllers must be ready for the registration.
